name: Schedulicity Online Appointment Booking API
what_it_does: Online appointment booking and business management platform for service-based businesses — enabling salons, spas, fitness studios, and wellness practitioners to manage online bookings, class schedules, client management, marketing, and payment processing, primarily serving small independent service businesses with a consumer-facing marketplace for clients to discover and book local services.
use_cases: Integrating Schedulicity appointment data via API for CRM and business analytics
Automating client notifications via Schedulicity API for appointment reminder workflows
Managing class schedules via Schedulicity API for fitness studio automation
Syncing booking data via Schedulicity API for multi-location business management
Building client-facing booking flows via Schedulicity API for embedded booking widgets
not_for: Enterprise-scale scheduling with complex resource management (use Salesforce Field Service)
Medical/clinical scheduling requiring EHR integration (use SimplePractice or Practice Fusion)
best_when: A salon, spa, fitness studio, or wellness practitioner needs online booking management with a marketplace presence — where Schedulicity's consumer app drives client discovery.
avoid_when: You need enterprise features, EHR integration, or serve industries outside beauty/wellness/fitness.

auth.notes: API key authentication. Limited public API documentation — primarily used by approved integration partners. API access may require partnership agreement with Schedulicity. No OAuth2. No webhooks documented. Widget embed for booking without API. Most integrations via Zapier or native integrations rather than direct API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: unlimited appointments, basic features
pricing.paid_tiers: Unlimited $35/month (marketing tools, class packages, priority support)
pricing.notes: Montana company (Bozeman, MT). Founded 2007. Bootstrapped. 150,000+ service providers. Consumer marketplace: clients discover and book local services via Schedulicity app. Service categories: hair, massage, fitness, skin care, yoga, nail care, waxing, tanning. Payment processing via Schedulicity Pay (integrated). Marketing tools: email campaigns, promotions. Class and workshop scheduling. Waitlist management. Online reviews. Small business focused — no enterprise tiers. API access limited and not prominently documented — most integrations use widget embed or Zapier.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API access limited and not well documented. Montana bootstrapped company. Consumer marketplace model. Free plan available. API likely requires partnership. Most integrations via widget embed or Zapier. Not recommended for direct API integration without partnership.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Appointment reads idempotent by appointment ID. Appointment creation: check for conflicts. Limited API documentation makes idempotency behavior uncertain.
known_agent_gotchas: API documentation is very limited — not a developer-first platform
API access likely requires partnership agreement with Schedulicity — contact sales
Most integrations use embedded booking widget or Zapier, not direct API calls
Consumer marketplace model: clients find businesses through Schedulicity app
Free plan available but marketing and API features require paid plan
Montana bootstrapped company — limited engineering resources for API development

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. US company. GDPR compliance unclear (US-only data residency). Client PII in booking data (names, contact info, services received). Limited API documentation makes security assessment difficult. Consumer marketplace model — client data shared between business and Schedulicity. No OAuth2.
